MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-03-2018 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S STIPULATED MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL AND RELATED DEADLINES. DEMIAN OKSENENDLER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JAMES WAITE, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SEAGATE PROPERTIES. LINDA MEYER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BART DISTRICT. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/9/18 IS CONTINUED TO 9/10/18 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. ALL TRIAL-RELATED AND TRIAL BASED DEADLINES ARE CONTINUED TO DATES COMMENSURATE WITH THE NEW TRIAL DATE. TO THE EXTENT ANY DEADLINES HAVE EXPIRED, THE PARTIES STIPULATE THAT THEY SHALL BE REVIVED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
